title: Pilot policy decisions
expected_decisions: The initial release will remain an invited pilot.
The pilot will support no more than ten users.
Pilot recordings will be limited to thirty minutes.
The standard output will include purpose, outcome, decisions, risks, key points, and next steps.
Custom reporting will remain outside the initial pilot.
The pilot will use email and password authentication rather than single sign-on.
Uploaded pilot recordings will follow a thirty-day retention policy.
Email will be the standard support channel for the pilot.
audio_notes: Synthetic multi-speaker meeting at natural speech speed with approximately 6.6-second pauses between turns.
